arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund's goalscoring woes at Manchester United show no sign of abating.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Casemiro 'makes feelings clear' on Red Devils exit as club are made to pay for questionable signing
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Casemiro is allegedly 'increasingly likely' to stay at Old Trafford until his lucrative contract expires in the summer of 2026.

arts.ttl: Man Utd open talks for ‘new Virgil van Dijk’
arts.sum: Manchester United have opened talks to sign RB Leipzig defensive star Castello Lukeba. That is according to Sacha Tovalieri, who reports that United have opened negotiations with the entourage of Lukeba ahead of the summer transfer market.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag reveals three things he misses about Manchester United after exit
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag left his post as manager at Manchester United in October after two years at the club

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim points finger of blame for Rasmus Hojlund goal drought
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund hasn't scored a single goal in any competition in 2025 and Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has given his take on the striker's struggles

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Ipswich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United host Ipswich Town at Old Trafford in the Premier League this evening. Ruben Amorim takes on the same opponents from his first game in charge, in what has been a tough start to life in the Premier League. arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Ipswich – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome a relegation-threatened Ipswich Town to Old Trafford this evening. A spirited second-half display from the Red Devils helped them salvage a point away to Everton on Saturday. Ruben Amorim had no fresh injury news to report in his post-match press conference.
